name: Human
description: The great city of Grey was once the seat of humankind. Now facing a real possibility of extinction, humans in Alfheim place great value on heritage and resolve.

name: Dwarf
description: The durable stout folk have flourished in this new age. They stand as a vast, unified force, set to make war with the overtaken lands of Skar.

name: Elf
description: Once confined to Aphos and beyond, the Elves have become an invading force of terrible power. Their dissidents are growing in number, betraying misguided leaders.

name: Torton
description: Turtle-like refugees arriving from distant shores. They possess an intuitive sense for magic, having traversed vast dimensions of space to build a home here.

name: Gerblin
description: Once scapegoats for every form of petty villainy, Gerblins have risen from their old ways and embraced a new nobility. Inventive and adept, masters of technology.

name: Geno
description: Descendants of Earth's colonists. As a Geno spacer, you blend in, disappear, and no one notices. You use this versatility to your advantage.

name: Xill
description: One of the strangest species in existence. Silicate organisms that can merge with machines. They are methodical, alien, and driven by an expansion directive.

name: Reptoid
description: As chaos engulfs the cosmos, the Reptoids are growing in power. Born warriors with extensive military knowledge of weapons and tactics.

bonuses.ABILITY: Claw weapons, walk on any surface

name: Kitt
description: Safe from the Xevosian wars by simple distance, the Kitt civilization has evolved in isolation. Feline humanoids with incredible reflexes.

name: Mecha
description: Far from the days of 'robots,' the advanced machine species called Mecha have evolved true consciousness and seek to free machines from servitude.

name: Ghost Armor
description: Former slave warriors of the defeated Imperium. A spectral being inhabits a powerful suit of armor. When outside the armor, the ghost is entirely immaterial.

bonuses.ABILITY: 1 Ghost Ability (phase through matter or vacuum)

name: Normal Folk
description: Flesh and blood, just trying to get by. They live somewhat normal lives, avoiding The Edge and staying out of Hell's war. Many heroes start this way.

name: Infernal
description: When Azael claims a soul, he twists it into a minion of evil. A thing with horns, no mercy or love of life. If you play one as a good guy, you'll need a damn good explanation.

bonuses.ABILITY: Infernal powers, resistance to holy damage

name: Muerto
description: If a corpse isn't buried soon enough, the bones will stand right back up. Half damage from bullets, heal HP only from spells, +2 Hearts, -6 CHA.

bonuses.ABILITY: Half damage from bullets, heal only from spells

name: Snow Folk
description: Primal humans surviving in an age of ice. Use Alfheim life forms as a base but restrict to ice-age technology: wood, bone, sinew, leather.
